message:
test(security): add unit tests for rate limiter module

11 tests covering: allow/deny thresholds, independent key tracking,
window expiry reset, retryAfterSeconds accuracy, peek without
incrementing, and checkMultipleLimits (all-allow, any-deny, empty
checks, most-restrictive remaining).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
